message:
fix(codegen): Handle array/dict type transitions with proper shadowing

- assign.zig: Extend shadowing logic to detect array<->dict transitions,
  not just list<->dict. Uses container_traits.isArray() for detection.
- core.zig: Add widen() comments for future clarity
- comprehensions.zig: Fix tuple AST access to only when node is tuple

This fixes tests where a variable is first assigned an array like [1]
then later reassigned to a dict like {1: 2}. The codegen now shadows
the variable with a new declaration instead of attempting type coercion.
